slogan: On Fait Briller vos Espaces Comme Jamais

headings.strategy: High impact, wide geometric sans for trust and modern feel. No Inter for headings. Use tracking-tight for large headings.

body.strategy: Highly readable, human-centric sans serif for content.

surfaces.classes: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-white/20 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(30,58,138,0.05)] backdrop-saturate-150

bg-white rounded-3xl border border-slate-100 shadow-[0_4px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.03)] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_12px_32px_rgba(30,58,138,0.08)] transition-transform transition-shadow duration-300

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay (opacity 1-2%) on hero sections to kill digital flatness.

layouts.hero: Minimalist split or asymmetrical focus. Massive bold heading left-aligned, soft sparkling imagery right-aligned. Negative space utilized heavily (py-24 or py-32).
layouts.services_grid: Bento Box style. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6. Mix row-spans to break symmetry. Example: Nettoyage Résidentiel (col-span-8), Commercial (col-span-4).
layouts.spacing_scale: Use p-8, p-12, py-24 for vertical rhythm.

components.navbar: Fixed at top. Logo left, pages center, primary CTA right. Pages: Accueil, Services, À propos, Contact, Blog.
components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full). Primary uses pure brand color (#1E3A8A) with white text and subtle hover lift. Include micro-animations.
components.testimonials: Must feature large decorative quotation marks at start and end. Use Manrope for quotes, center-aligned or elegantly staggered. Include small avatar.
components.contact_actions: Two prominent pill buttons on the contact page/section: 'Envoyer un SMS' (href='sms:4385252631') and 'Envoyer un Courriel' (href='mailto:Brillexa.cleaning@gmail.com'). No backend forms.

motion.page_transitions: Framer motion opacity + y-axis slide (20px) on load.
motion.hover_states: Buttons and cards must have transform and shadow transitions (duration-300 ease-out).
motion.scroll_reveal: Use staggered entrance animations for lists and grids.

hero_residential.description: Modern, sparkling clean living room with large window.

commercial_cleaning.description: Professional commercial office cleaning in progress.

testimonial_avatar.description: Happy smiling customer for testimonial section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use .js/.jsx extensions for all files, DO NOT use .tsx/.ts files.
Install and use lucide-react for icons.
Install and use framer-motion for UI interactions.
Do NOT use pure white backgrounds everywhere without structural contrast. Use #FAFAFA for main background and #FFFFFF for cards.
Build custom layout sections rather than relying strictly on generic Shadcn cards for marketing areas.
Ensure the hero section overlay is subtle. The hero must communicate cleanliness and light.
Use data-testid on all interactive elements: navigation links, buttons, SMS/Email action buttons.
All text is in French. Be mindful of accented characters.
No backend logic for the contact form: use standard HTML anchor tags styling as buttons with href='mailto:Brillexa.cleaning@gmail.com' and href='sms:4385252631'.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Do not converge toward generic outputs. Use creative layouts.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Add specific transitions.
You MUST NOT center align the app container in CSS.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters.
Use generous spacing (2-3x more than usual).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure Royal Blue text on white backgrounds passes WCAG AA.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
accessibility.focus: Custom focus rings (ring-blue-900) on all tabbable elements.
